title: Snickerdoodles and Snickerdoodle Sandwich Cookies
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, cream together 1 ½ cups sugar and 1 cup butter.
Beat in eggs and vanilla until light and fluffy.
In a second bowl, whisk together flour, salt, baking soda, and cream of tartar.
Add dry ingredients to the butter mixture and mix until combined.
In a pie plate, mix 4 tbsp sugar and 4 tsp cinnamon.
Shape dough into 1-inch balls and roll in the cinnamon sugar mixture.
Place cookies 2 inches apart on parchment-lined baking sheets.
Bake at 375 degrees F for 8-9 minutes.
For the frosting, place softened butter in a large mixing bowl and cream until smooth.
Add powdered sugar and heavy cream in batches, whipping until smooth.
Add vanilla and cinnamon flavoring to the frosting and adjust seasonings if desired.
Once cookies are baked and cooled, spread frosting on the bottom of one snickerdoodle cookie.
Top with another snickerdoodle cookie to create a sandwich cookie.
notes: To make sandwich cookies, roll the snickerdoodle dough into small balls before baking.
These snickerdoodle sandwich cookies were made for Joy and Nick's wedding reception.
